## Checklist

- [ ] I've read the [Contributing Guidelines](CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] The change targets **evergreen browsers** (Chrome 120+, Firefox 120+, Safari 17+, Edge 120+)
- [ ] The change is a normalization fix, not an opinionated style preference
- [ ] I've added tests for browser-specific behavior (if applicable)
- [ ] StyleLint passes (`npm run lint`)
- [ ] All tests pass (`npm test`)
- [ ] Bundle size hasn't increased significantly (`npm run size`)
- [ ] Comments in the CSS explain the _why_ (browser bug, inconsistency, etc.)
- [ ] If adding custom properties, they follow the `--fn-` naming convention
